Engineering Colleges, IIIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Information Technology, Kalyani
Also Known AsIIIT Kalyani
Institute TypePublic–Private Partnership
Established2014
LocationKalyani, West Bengal

IIIT Kalyani: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIIT Kalyani.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Webel IT Park, Near Buddha Park, Kalyani, Nadia, West Bengal - 741235

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata
44 km
Kalyani Railway Station
5 km
Howrah Junction Railway Station
55 km
Sealdah Railway Station
55 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

Information currently unavailable.

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹3,000
One-Time Fees₹7,700
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,10,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹3,680
Total₹1,24,380

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹3,000
One-Time Fees₹1,000
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹24,420
Other Fees (per Semester)₹13,200
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹20,000
Total₹61,620
